title: Silhouette Studies
description: Three independent silhouette-as-container studies: the black outline holds a full narrative world inside — tower, doorway, and skull each framing a different universe.
creative_direction: Each image uses a different iconic silhouette (tower / doorway / skull) as a narrative container. The outline stays crisp and solid black; the inside carries an entire scene with its own color temperature that contrasts the outside field.

en.title: Silhouette Studies
en.description: Three independent silhouette-as-container studies: the black outline holds a full narrative world inside — tower, doorway, and skull each framing a different universe.

zh-CN.title: 剪影单图研究
zh-CN.description: 三张独立的剪影容器研究: 黑色轮廓内部装入完整叙事世界,塔、门和骷髅分别框住不同宇宙。
